creator: toxa@toxahost.ru
text:
Free-SA is a new log parser, similar to SARG and lightsquid. But it's much faster and has more clean codebase. 
from project page:

Free-SA is statistic analyzer for daemons log files similar to SARG. 
Its main advantages over SARG are much better speed (7x-20x times), 
more reports support, crossplatform work and W3C compliance of generated HTML/CSS reports code.

Fix: please see shar file provided below
